_doc: User-prompt keyword triggers → recommended playbook/hint/tool. Plain substrings match literally; tokens with ^ $ | ( ) [ ] are treated as regex. Copy to .harness/keywords.json and add your project's triggers (mirror your CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md).

rules.hint: Run the configured verification checks before committing/pushing: `harness verify`.
Snapshot working state for the next session: `harness handoff <reason>`.
각 소스 서브폴더에 CLAUDE.md(로컬 가이드)를 두면 AI 가 그 폴더만 읽어도 맥락을 잡는다. 누락 폴더 확인: `harness folders scan`, 템플릿 생성: `harness folders scaffold <dir>`.
